name: NTRIP stream stall watchdog — alert after 60s of silence
info:
Alerts when the NTRIP correction stream stops delivering data.

How it works:
- Every message from the NTRIP Client resets the trigger node's timer.
- If no message arrives within 60 seconds, the trigger fires and the STALL
  debug pane shows an alert.
- When data resumes, the next message resets the timer — no explicit
  "recovered" notification is emitted (extend the flow with a function
  node if you need that).

Adjust the timeout in the trigger node's Duration field.

name: 60s stall watchdog
op2: NTRIP stream stalled — no data for 60 s
